LandingPage.heroDesc: Pioneering XML-structured legal data management platform in Vietnam, focusing on Business & Commerce. The system acts as a professional AI assistant, automatically reviewing contracts, warning risks, and creating records.
LandingPage.challengesTitle: Challenges for Legal Departments & Law Firms
LandingPage.challengesDesc: Manual processes make error rates in data entry, review, or version updates inevitable.
LandingPage.challenge1Desc: Every new contract requires repeating the entire process of collecting and re-entering data from various sources.
LandingPage.challenge2Desc: Complex document volumes make storage and retrieval difficult, leading to errors and misplacement.
LandingPage.challenge3Desc: Pressure to comply with frequently changing regulations demands rapid updates and adjustments.
LandingPage.challenge4Desc: Traditional filename-based searches make it impossible to accurately locate specific clauses in PDF archives.
LandingPage.challenge5Desc: Lack of a synchronized technology solution capable of connecting all parties in the litigation process.
LandingPage.challenge6Desc: Expert resources are held back by manual processing, instead of focusing on strategic consulting activities.
LandingPage.core1Desc: Pioneering the conversion of all records to XML format instead of stopping at PDF/JPEG files.
LandingPage.core2Desc: Automatically supports document creation, content verification, compliance checking, and legal risk detection.
LandingPage.core3Desc: Users can query deep into content through the XML core layer, accurately searching for specific clauses.
LandingPage.core4Desc: AI processing combined with Admin Review, committed to 99.9% accuracy KPI for sensitive data fields.
LandingPage.core5Desc: AI is proactively trained in-depth on legal datasets specializing in Business & Commerce.
LandingPage.core6Desc: 2-layer data encryption and data separation design strictly compliant with Decree 13/2023/ND-CP.
LandingPage.stat1Desc: We focus on proving concrete results (such as reducing search time from 15 minutes to just 2 seconds).
LandingPage.stat2Desc: AI identification, legal cross-checking, and drafting support free experts from repetitive tasks.
LandingPage.stat3Desc: Storage system designed with multi-layer data separation, tiered encryption, and access control.
LandingPage.featuresDesc: Going beyond traditional storage to become a Production Tool.
LandingPage.feature1Desc: Convert data to XML format to standardize legal data, not just raw JSON extraction.
LandingPage.feature2Desc: AI reviews document errors (form & content), detects risks, and suggests corrections.
LandingPage.feature3Desc: Separate OCR and Storage modules. 2-layer data encryption with AES-256 standard.
LandingPage.feature4Desc: AI acts as an assistant helping users build legal documents on demand based on Data Warehouse content.
LandingPage.feature5Desc: Search clause content deep within all legacy contracts instead of just searching PDF filenames.
LandingPage.feature6Desc: Synchronized design capable of connecting all parties in litigation proceedings.
LandingPage.pricingDesc: Flexible pricing models for small legal departments to large corporations
LandingPage.pricingNote: * We also offer a Business Premium plan (From 5,000,000₫) with custom AI model and on-premise deployment.
LandingPage.faq1Q: How does the system handle AI recognition errors?
LandingPage.faq1A: We apply a "Human-in-the-Loop" process. AI handles the initial processing, then mandatory Admin Review for data fields with confidence below 95%, committed to a 99.9% accuracy KPI.
LandingPage.faq2Q: How do you ensure customer data safety under the law?
LandingPage.faq2A: The system strictly complies with Decree 13/2023/ND-CP on personal data protection. Analytics algorithms only operate on anonymized datasets. Data is encrypted with 2-layer AES-256 standard.
LandingPage.faq3Q: How can I find a specific clause buried deep in old contracts?
LandingPage.faq3A: Since the system converts structure to the XML core layer, you can quickly find "All damage compensation clauses with Partner A from 2020" with precision.
LandingPage.faq4Q: What if the system overloads when processing Big Data?
LandingPage.faq4A: The system uses Microservices Architecture: separate OCR and Storage modules to prevent full system crashes. A Disaster Recovery plan enables switchover to backup servers within 15 minutes.
LandingPage.ctaDesc: Standard digitalization, solid legality. Turn 'mountains of paper' into a goldmine of digital data with specialized AI for the legal industry.
LandingPage.footerDesc: AI-integrated solution supporting legal document digitalization in the business & commerce sector.
LandingPage.footerUniv: Ho Chi Minh City University of Law
